name: Number 45: Crumble Logos the Prophet of Demolition
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>４５ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>滅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>亡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>予</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>言</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> クランブル・ロゴス
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Yonjūgo Metsubō no Yogensha Kuranburu Rogosu
name_jp_tl: Numbers 45: Crumble Logos the Prophet of Demolition
desc:
2+ Level 2 monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 other face-up card on the field; while this monster is face-up on the field, that target's effects are negated. While that target is on the field, cards with the same name as that target, and their effects, cannot be activated.
mnst_eff:
2+ Level 2 monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 other face-up card on the field; while this monster is face-up on the field, that target's effects are negated. While that target is on the field, cards with the same name as that target, and their effects, cannot be activated.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
